Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Most parameters are within normal limits. Notable findings include mild hypoglycemia (glucose 66.9 mg/dL), low urine specific gravity (1.0), and elevated platelet indices (PDW and MPV), which may suggest increased platelet turnover or activation. No evidence of infection or renal dysfunction. Clinical correlation is recommended for hypoglycemia and abnormal platelet parameters.
